rootCause: A built-in electronics quest used id `electronics/tin-soldering-iron` but was stored at `frontend/src/pages/quests/json/electronics/soldering-intro.json`, so direct GitHub links based on the canonical quest id 404ed and documentation drifted to the filename alias.
resolution: Renamed the quest JSON file to `tin-soldering-iron.json`, updated docs/assets references that still used `soldering-intro`, and added a regression test that enforces id-to-path parity for every built-in quest file.
